textByHashes.89a10e75cf57ef859234b87e7a9e0230763c4d21: Agh! You scared me! Now I've lost my lockpick.
textByHashes.bec6e2b7270b65072eae47d2f5eae6bd65a6b5bc: Don't worry about it, I brought an extra just in case. Lockpicks really do help with disarming these traps.
textByHashes.9fb219a7f076707c5728f1d4496a3e46ccc75ca8: It's called the Rogue's outfit. I got it from the Rogue's Den in Burthorpe. I've found it helps me blend in when pickpocketing people, allowing me to steal more coins from them.
textByHashes.8b889db50e6d7e93ed1ac6029daf0bdf655eb052: Ha ha ha, of course not! I don't think the coffin cares whether or not I blend in.
textByHashes.14801e3b90229745c531f1dc1d63c8eae131bdd3: Honestly, I just really like how it looks. You've got to look your best while travelling right?
textByHashes.417404c75de7567da6edc55211ff1c13459f63b4: Agh, thought I had it that time!
